entries.title: Focus Timer for Lawyers - Billable Hours & Deep Work | Superfocus
entries.description: Focus timer for lawyers. Pomodoro or Deep Work for research, briefs, discovery. Block time, track sessions, meet deadlines.
entries.h1: Focus Timer for Lawyers: Billable Hours & Deep Work

Billable hours slipping?
